changes: Rewrote Settings page presentation to match design-system screenshot: replaced old Header with ScreenHeader (back+subtitle, borderless bg-app); replaced flat sections with grouped card layout (rounded-[14px] shadow-sm, border-separated rows using local SRow component matching er-srow/er-group pattern); added Avatar in Conta section user row; Sair row in red (loss-500) inside Conta group instead of standalone button; Segmented controls inline in rows for Tema/Unidade/Tamanho with correct widths (210/130px); Modo de montagem with full-width Segmented below subtitle row; uppercase GroupLabel (11px bold tracking); SValue for static right-aligned text; Dados section with Exportar CSV row. All hooks/state/navigation preserved (useSettings, useTheme, useAuth, password sheet, export CSV, logout).
